recommendations.title: The Seventh Day
recommendations.overview: A renowned exorcist teams up with a rookie priest for his first day of training. As they plunge deeper into hell on earth, the lines between good and evil blur, and their own demons emerge.

recommendations.title: The Visitor
recommendations.overview: After a series of tragedies including the death of his father-in-law, Robert and his wife Maia leave their home in London to move back to her childhood home. But when Robert discovers an old portrait in the attic of a man who is his spitting image, h

recommendations.title: The Girl with All the Gifts
recommendations.overview: In the future, a strange fungus has changed nearly everyone into thoughtless, flesh-eating monsters. When a scientist and a teacher find a girl who seems to be immune to the fungus, they all begin a journey to save humanity.

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.

recommendations.title: Parasyte: Part 2
recommendations.overview: Humanity is under attack by human-mimicking flesh-eating alien parasites. One parasite bonds with his young high school student host, and he convinces the parasite to help him stop the others.

recommendations.title: The NeverEnding Story
recommendations.overview: While hiding from bullies in his school's attic, a young boy discovers the extraordinary land of Fantasia, through a magical book called The Neverending Story. The book tells the tale of Atreyu, a young warrior who, with the help of a luck dragon nam

recommendations.title: Near Dark
recommendations.overview: A farm boy reluctantly becomes a member of the undead when a girl he meets turns out to be part of a band of vampires who roam the highways in stolen cars.

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.

recommendations.title: Hagazussa
recommendations.overview: In the 15th century, a young goatherd living alone in a mountain hut feels a dark presence in the woods.

recommendations.title: Insanitarium
recommendations.overview: After he's institutionalized in order to cover for his sister, a young man encounters a doctor who is turning his patients into flesh-eating psychopaths.
